message:
test(e2e): add privacy mode E2E tests (bd-3vnmq)

Add comprehensive E2E tests for privacy mode under e2e/privacy_test.go:

Tests:
- TestPrivacyModeBlocksCheckpoint: Verify checkpoint creation blocked
- TestPrivacyModeSupportBundleSuppression: Verify support-bundle respects privacy
- TestAllowPersistOverride: Verify --allow-persist enables persistence
- TestPrivacyModeMetadataStillIncluded: Verify safe metadata in robot-status
- TestNoFilesWrittenInPrivacyMode: Verify no persistent files created

Features:
- PrivacyTestSuite with isolated temp environment (HOME, XDG_CONFIG_HOME)
- Hermetic tests that don't affect developer's real config
- Structured logging with TestLogger for debugging
- Cleanup of test sessions on completion

Build: go test -tags e2e ./e2e -run Privacy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
